metadata.description: Deployment channels and runtime surfaces for shipper, carrier, operations, integration, financial, and intelligence products.

channels.name: Shipper Web Portal
channels.description: Shipper shipment creation, booking, tracking, reporting, document, invoice, and support workspace.

channels.name: Carrier Web and Mobile
channels.description: Carrier onboarding, load discovery, booking, tracking, document upload, payment, and scorecard experience.

channels.name: Operations Control Tower
channels.description: Brokerage and managed transportation workspace for tendering, tracking, exception recovery, documents, and communications.

channels.name: Customer Integration Gateway
channels.description: EDI, API, file, and webhook gateway for orders, tenders, milestones, documents, appointments, and invoices.

channels.name: Freight Runtime
channels.description: Backend runtime for shipment state, tendering, matching, pricing, visibility, settlement, risk, automation, and data.
